## Type of change

- [ ] New rule / human-review prompt

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] I added or updated a test for this change
- [ ] I updated relevant docs in `docs/` if behavior or a rule changed
- [ ] User-facing text (issue explanations, next steps, UI copy) is plain-language, specific, and non-shaming
